visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a bright animated graphic showing the Costco Wholesale logo prominently at the top. Below the logo, a large text bubble with a green background displays information about weekly specials. A cartoon character is visible on the left, looking surprised. The background shows a blurry warehouse store environment with high ceilings and rows of products on shelves. (2) The scene transitions to a series of rapid shots within a Costco warehouse. A stack of yellow milk powder tins is shown on a shelf, with a red price overlay appearing in the center. The camera pans slightly to the right to reveal more tins. The lighting is bright and even, characteristic of a large retail store. (3) The visual shifts to the refrigerated meat section. Packages of pink chicken breast in vacuum-sealed bags are piled in a bin. A price overlay with yellow and red text describes the discount. (4) The sequence continues with various product categories: plastic trays of marbled red beef ribs, rows of colorful macarons in boxes, and stacks of yellow and red snack boxes (Cheetos and Ritz). The camera moves in a series of straight cuts, focusing on each item for a few seconds. Price overlays remain consistent in style, appearing at the center of the frame. (5) The video explores the beverage and dry goods aisles, showing boxes of green tea, bottles of apple juice, and packages of noodles. The environment remains a warehouse setting with metal racks and industrial lighting. Text overlays change with each item to reflect specific brand names and prices.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: No humans are clearly identifiable in the focus of the frames; only products are highlighted.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The background consists of the interior of a Costco warehouse store, featuring high industrial ceilings, large metal storage racks, fluorescent lighting, and rows of bulk-packaged consumer goods.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a fast-paced, high-energy male narrator introducing the Costco weekly specials. The voice is enthusiastic with a clear, projected tone. Background music is an upbeat, major-key electronic pop track with a steady, driving beat. (2) As the visuals transition between products, the narrator rapidly lists each item and its sale price. The speech rate is extremely high, with almost no pauses between phrases. The music remains consistent in volume and tempo, providing a rhythmic bed for the voice. (3) Periodic subtle 'whoosh' sound effects are audible during visual transitions, coinciding with the narrator switching to a new product name. The acoustic environment is clean, resembling a studio recording rather than field audio from the store. (4) The narrator continues his high-arousal delivery through the entire list, maintaining a positive and authoritative tone. The music builds slightly in energy but does not overshadow the clear articulation of the prices. The audio ends abruptly as the final item is mentioned.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional bulletin to inform viewers about current weekly discounts at Costco Wholesale in Taiwan. By combining rapid-fire narration with clear visual price comparisons and high-energy music, it aims to drive foot traffic to the store by highlighting value deals on popular grocery items.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The entire video is dedicated to showcasing products and prices from a specific retailer (Costco) with clear branding and call-to-actions.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-density social-native retail promotion using listicle format for maximum information delivery in a short timeframe.
